folio.label: 18r
folio.l: That ©eueth hem ful oft , in many gyse
Wel beter , æa~ne æei can , hem self deuyse
So~me man desire , for to haue richesse
That cause is of here mordre , or gret seknes
And so~me man wold , out of prison fayn
That in his hous , is of his meyne slayn
Infenyt harmes , ben in this matere
We wot neuäe , what we preisen here
We faren as he , æ dronken is as a mous
A dronke man wot wel , he hath an hous
But he ne wot which is , æe rigút weye theder
And to a dronke man , the weye is slyder
And certes in æis world , so fare we
We seke faste after , felicite
But we gon wrongö , ful ofte trewely
Thus may we seyn alle , and namely I
That wende , and had , a gret opinyon
That if I myght escape , from prisou~
Than had I ben , in ioye & ¹fyt hele
That now am exiled , fro my wele
Syn I may nou©t so ©ow , Emelye
InIIn am but ded , æäe is non oæä remedye
¢ Vp on æ oæä side , Palamon
Whan æ he wist , æ Arcite was gon
Swich sorwe he maketh , æ the grete Tour
Resouned of his Ianglyngöö , and clamour
The pure feteres , on his shynes grete
Were of his bittere , Salt teres , wete
Allas q¶ he , Arcite Cosyn myn
Of al oure strif , god wot æe fruyt is thyn
Thow walkest now , in Thebes at thy large
And of my woo , æè ©euest litel charge
Thow maist , sithe æè hast , wysdom & manhode
Assemble alle the folk , of oure kynrede
And make a werre so sharp , on this Citee
That be som auenture , or tretee
Thow maist haue hire , to lady & to wyf´
For whom I must nedes , lese my lyf´
For as be weye , of possibilitee
Sithe æè art at æe large , of prison free
And art a lord , gret is æin auauntage
